channel.title: Jason David Newton Blog
channel.description: Personal reflections on faith, family, fatherhood, leadership, and life in Moses Lake, Washington by Jason David Newton

item.title: Being a Christian Dad in Moses Lake: Balancing Faith, Family, and a Mechanical Tech Life
item.description: Real talk on balancing faith, family, and work as a mechanical technician in Moses Lake, Washington.

item.title: 7 Simple Bible Study Habits That Actually Work for Busy Christian Dads in Moses Lake
item.description: Practical Bible study habits for busy dads — keeping faith strong amid work and family life in Moses Lake, WA.
